name: Pastilla
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the spices together.
2. Cook the chicken in olive oil until it is browned on all sides.
3. Stir in the chopped onions and cook until they are soft.
4. Add salt, pepper, coriander seeds, cinnamon, saffron, cumin seeds, allspice, clove, and ginger root to taste.
5. Pour in enough water or chicken broth to cover the chicken by about an inch.
6. Simmer covered for 40-45 minutes, adding more liquid if needed and turning the pieces a few times while cooking.
7. Once cooked through, remove the chicken and let it cool before cutting into bite-sized pieces.
8. In a separate pan, let the sauce reduce until thickened.
9. Arrange phyllo leaves in an oiled spring form pan, starting with one leaf at the bottom, then overlapping 8 leaves on the sides of the pan to cover the base.
10. Beat the eggs and egg yolk together and stir into the sauce.
11. Layer the chicken pieces over the sauce in the center of the phyllo leaves.
12. Sprinkle almonds over the chicken.
13. Pour the egg mixture over the top, then add more phyllo leaf on top.
14. Brush with oil before baking.
15. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until golden and crispy, about 45 minutes.
16. Let cool for 10 minutes before sprinkling with sugar and cinnamon to serve.
